_auth_example._comment: Example only (ignored by the loader). To capture logged-in pages: rename this key to `auth`, then mark routes with auth:true. Credentials are NEVER stored here — set VRT_USERNAME and VRT_PASSWORD as CircleCI env vars. Override the env var names with usernameEnv/passwordEnv if needed.
_auth_example._preFormSelector_comment: Optional: a selector to click BEFORE the username/password fields are filled, for login pages that hide the form behind a button/toggle. Leave empty to skip.
